response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development across multiple languages and frameworks, but his expertise in Java, Kotlin, and enterprise JVM tooling is limited or not prominently highlighted. While he has worked with Java in robotic arms and NI LabWindows/CVI, his recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and other non-JVM technologies. His interest in IDE internals and language tooling is also not evident from the resume.
strengths: Strong multi-language and multi-paradigm programming experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven track record in building and maintaining complex systems and large-scale codebases
Experience with testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD) and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited demonstrated expertise in Java/Kotlin and enterprise JVM frameworks like Spring
No clear indication of experience with IDE internals or language tooling development
Recent roles lack deep focus on enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling or JVM performance optimization

key_factors.factor: IDE internals and language tooling interest
